since_last: 54% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.19%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 54% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC +0.71% · Gold +1.38% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 54% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.19%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.19%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.51%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMAT is the standout at +8.28%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +8.28%, TER +7.69%, LRCX +7.39%, KLAC +6.83%, MU +6.56%. Laggards: IBM -5.74%, CRM -5.07%, NOW -4.90%, WDAY -4.08%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.13% at $151.45
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.13% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
